seoTitle: Devon North vs Dewhurst — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Devon North and Dewhurst. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Devon North vs Dewhurst: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Devon North and Dewhurst.
heading: Devon North vs Dewhurst — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Devon North, Victoria and Dewhurst, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dewhurst has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Devon North (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Devon North or Dewhurst safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Devon North has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Dewhurst scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Devon North scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Dewhurst scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Devon North or Dewhurst?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dewhurst has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
